allow:
Bash(# Step 2: Clean local build artifacts
echo "🧹 Cleaning local build artifacts..."
find . -name "*.xcresult" -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
find . -name "build" -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
find . -name ".build" -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
echo "✅ Local build artifacts cleaned")

Bash(# Step 3: Clean Swift Package Manager cache
echo "🧹 Cleaning Swift Package Manager cache..."
rm -rf ~/Library/Caches/org.swift.swiftpm/
rm -rf ~/Library/org.swift.swiftpm/
echo "✅ Swift Package Manager cache cleaned")

Bash(# Step 4: Clean Firebase/SPM packages from project
echo "🧹 Cleaning project package cache..."
if [ -d ".swiftpm" ]; then
    rm -rf .swiftpm
    echo "✅ Project .swiftpm directory removed"
else
    echo "ℹ️ No .swiftpm directory found"
fi)
